critical_invariants: Queue entry format: exactly 16 bytes per entry - opcode(4), flags(4), address(8) must not change
Head/tail pointer arithmetic must wrap correctly at queue boundary (modulo queue size)
Head pointer is GPU-owned (read-only by CPU), tail pointer is CPU-owned (read-only by GPU)
Queue base address at 0x400000 with 64KB size must not change
SFENCE must precede doorbell write to ensure all queue entries are visible to GPU
Queue full condition: (tail + 1) mod size == head must prevent overflow
Queue empty condition: head == tail must be checked before wait returns
known_opportunities: Queue batching: accumulate multiple commands and submit with single doorbell write
Cache-line alignment: align queue entries to 64-byte cache lines to prevent false sharing
Prefetch next queue entry while processing current one
Shadow tail pointer: update local copy and write to MMIO only on flush
Command coalescing: merge consecutive same-type commands into single batch command
Ring buffer power-of-2 sizing: replace modulo with AND mask for wrap-around
Write-combining for queue memory region to batch MMIO writes
Doorbell coalescing: single doorbell for multiple queued commands
